description: Actionable task database. 'tasks_by_category' indexes tasks per attribute (used by attribute-driven reasoning). 'tasks_by_problem' indexes tasks per detected problem ID (used after Phase 0 semantic search to focus the recommender on relevant remedies).

task_list: Take the detailed Prakriti assessment questionnaire
